perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman in a yellow sweatshirt struggling to juggle multiple gift bags with family labels. (2) Transition to a studio setting where the woman stands behind a table filled with various 7-Eleven gift boxes. (3) Close-up shots of Starbucks-branded red and pink metal gift boxes containing coffee egg rolls and sticks. (4) Presentation of an Ultraman-themed capsule machine toy that dispenses candy. (5) Showcasing Kuromi-themed piggy banks and candy buckets. (6) Introduction of character-themed boxes featuring Toshio and a Miss Rabbit snake-shaped coin bank. (7) Demonstration of an OPEN-chan lucky draw box where the woman pulls out a prize. (8) Final scene showing the woman surrounded by all the gift boxes on a table, waving to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music starts. A high-pitched female voice energetically introduces the stress of New Year gifting. (2) Music continues as a clear male voiceover provides professional narration for specific product details and prices. (3) Sound effects including 'ding' and 'pop' are used during product reveals. (4) The audio maintains a consistent high-energy tempo with the male voiceover describing the features of each gift box. (5) The video ends with the female voice returning, followed by a crunching sound effect as she eats a snack.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'POV：過年要準備送禮的你' (POV: You preparing gifts for Lunar New Year) appears as a hook. (2) Functional text labels identify relatives like '爸爸媽媽' (Father/Mother) and '大伯' (Uncle). (3) '7-ELEVEN 都幫你準備好了!' (7-Eleven has everything ready for you!). (4) Decorative text overlays show product names and prices, such as '星巴克精選咖啡蛋捲禮盒 $580' and 'ULTRAMAN家庭扭蛋機禮盒 $1499'.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Gifting stress) -> Solution (7-Eleven intro) -> Product Showcase (Multiple items) -> Outro (Summary & CTA)

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator presenting the products.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a bright yellow oversized sweatshirt and black leggings.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A minimalist indoor studio with white walls, wooden flooring, and a large wooden table as the primary staging area.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the exclusive and diverse range of Lunar New Year gift boxes available at 7-Eleven, targeting consumers looking for convenient yet thoughtful gifting options.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of products with prices and store branding throughout.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-intensity verbal delivery and variety-show graphics.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses the relatable anxiety of holiday gifting to present a curated list of solutions, utilizing popular IP collaborations to increase appeal.
